claims: The repository contains a target shell for monotonicity of assignment Gaifman closeness.
The target shell records the dependency needed by radius monotonicity of locality input surfaces.
The target shell records the expected conversion from a larger-radius assignment-close hypothesis to a smaller-radius assignment-close shape.
nonclaims: Does not prove max-radius conjunction closure.
Does not prove max-radius disjunction closure.
Does not prove existential quantifier handling.
Does not prove arbitrary formula-radius construction.
Does not prove Gaifman locality for unguarded first-order logic.
Does not prove general finite model theory closure.
